raw_consumer_statement:
Starting from XX/XX/XXXX ( XXXX XXXX  ), theres been fraudulent charges on my Macys credit card. I have called multiple times to get it resolved, but each time, they deferred action and asked me to wait for further communication, which I did not receive. After calling in XXXX, they told me the card was on hold. However, this month ( XX/XX/XXXX ), another charge appeared. 

I received a phone number with a reference number that I called. They then told me to wait for more further communication. When I asked how long it would take, they said in XXXX days, which would be after my statement was due. They have told me that already multiple times. When I asked if I should file for fraud with the police or the government, they hung up. Its been over a month and they still refuse to even investigate the fraud charges.
